zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Cheney於1485年出生在英國肯特易亞斯丘其時，他的父親Sir William Cheney41歲，母親Lady Agnes Margaret Young40歲。他於1515年之前與Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯丘其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年12月15日在英國英格蘭肯特明斯特享年73歲，埋葬在英國肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Cheney于1485年出生在英国肯特易亞斯丘其时，他的父亲Sir William Cheney41岁，母亲Lady Agnes Margaret Young40岁。他于1515年之前与Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯丘其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年12月15日在英国英格兰肯特明斯特享年73岁，埋葬在英国肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Cheney was born in 1485, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, his father, Sir William Cheney, was 41 and his mother, Lady Agnes Margaret Young, was 40. He married Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke before 1515, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 15 December 1558, in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Cheney est né en 1485, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Cheney, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Margaret Young, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke avant 1515, à Eastchurch, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1558, à Minster, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Cheney 1485 in Eastchurch, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Cheney 41 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Margaret Young 40. Er hat vor 1515 in Eastchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1558 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Cheney è nato il nel 1485 nel Eastchurch, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir William Cheney, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Margaret Young, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke prima del 1515, nel Eastchurch, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1558, nel Minster, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Cheneyが1485年にイギリスケントエアストチャーチで生まれた時，父Sir William Cheneyは41歳，母Lady Agnes Margaret Youngは40歳であった。1515年以前にイギリスイギリスケントエアストチャーチでLady Frideswide Anne Frowickeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年12月15日にイギリスイギリスケントミンスターで73歳で死去し，イギリスケントイスル オフ シェッピーにて埋葬された。

ko.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이슬일 프 셰프피
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Cheney(이)가 1485년 영국 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Cheney(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Margaret Young(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1515년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 12월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 민스터에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 이슬일 프 셰프피에 묻혔다.

pt.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Cheney nasceu em 1485, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Cheney, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Margaret Young, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke antes 1515, em Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1558, em Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.

ro.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Cheney родился в 1485 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Cheney было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Margaret Young, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke перед 1515 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 15 декабря 1558 г. в местности минстир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия.

es.Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United K: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Cheney nació en 1485, en Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Cheney, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Margaret Young, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lady Frideswide Anne Frowicke antes de 1515, en Eastchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1558, en Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.
